channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agentopic: A Generative AI Agent Workflow for Explainable Topic Modeling
item.description: Agentopic uses multiple AI agents with LLMs for explainable topic modeling, achieving competitive performance while providing transparency in topic assignments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Polynomial-Time Optimal Group Selection via the Double-Commutator Eigenvalue Problem
item.description: Generalized eigenvalue problem of covariance matrix double-commutator provides polynomial-time solution to group selection, reducing exponential computational complexity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods
item.description: Benchmark of six sparse regression methods under correlated features and weak signals shows Bayesian methods superior for prediction, Lasso optimal for variable selection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Euler to Dormand-Prince: ODE Solvers for Flow Matching Generative Models
item.description: ODE solvers benchmarked for Flow Matching generative models show RK4 is more efficient than Euler, with solver selection especially critical for imperfect models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fast Log-Domain Sinkhorn Optimal Transport with Warp-Level GPU Reductions
item.description: Native CUDA implementation of log-domain Sinkhorn achieves 12x speedup with improved numerical stability for optimal transport computation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GAZE: Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation with Viewer-Level Tools and Literature Retrieval on Rare Brain MRI
item.description: GAZE enables vision-language models to diagnose rare brain pathologies through iterative MRI analysis with viewer tools and literature retrieval.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer
item.description: StyleShield achieves 94.6-99% evasion against AI-generated content detectors using continuous text style transfer while maintaining semantic similarity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku
item.description: Haiku integrates spatial proteomics, histology, and clinical metadata in a tri-modal contrastive learning model for cross-modal retrieval and clinical prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Review of the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve and a Proof About the Area Beneath It
item.description: Paper formalizes ROC curve AUC interpretation as classifier ranking probability and establishes theoretical bounds.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PhaseNet++: Phase-Aware Frequency-Domain Anomaly Detection for Industrial Control Systems via Phase Coherence Graphs
item.description: PhaseNet++ detects anomalies in industrial control systems using phase spectrum information via frequency-domain analysis and graph attention networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hierarchical Federated Learning for Networked AI: From Communication Saving to Architecture-Aware Design
item.description: Hierarchical federated learning is proposed as an architecture-aware design framework where convergence depends on hierarchy structure, optimization roles, and communication regimes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CGM-JEPA: Learning Consistent Continuous Glucose Monitor Representations via Predictive Self-Supervised Pretraining
item.description: CGM-JEPA learns glucose monitoring representations by predicting masked latent states rather than raw values, improving transfer across measurement modalities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structured Analytic Coherent Point Drift for Non-Rigid Point Set Registration
item.description: Analytic-CPD improves non-rigid point set registration by replacing kernel-based methods with structured analytic mappings, achieving faster convergence and lower errors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Watch Your Step: Information Injection in Diffusion Models via Shadow Timestep Embedding
item.description: Timestep embeddings in diffusion models enable side-channel information injection with potential applications in adversarial attacks and model defenses.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EventADL: Open-Box Anomaly Detection and Localization Framework for Events in Cloud-Based Service Systems
item.description: EventADL is an open-box anomaly detection framework for cloud systems that localizes root causes by analyzing event semantic and frequency patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fusing Urban Structure and Semantics: A Conditional Diffusion Model for Cross-City OD Matrix Generation
item.description: SEDAN, a diffusion model combining urban semantics and spatial constraints, generates generalizable cross-city commuting flow matrices.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Flat Facts to Sharp Hallucinations: Detecting Stubborn Errors via Gradient Sensitivity
item.description: From Flat Facts to Sharp Hallucinations: Detecting Stubborn Errors via Gradient Sensitivity

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Interpretable experiential learning based on state history and global feedback
item.description: Interpretable experiential learning based on state history and global feedback

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching
item.description: Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Graph Rewiring in GNNs to Mitigate Over-Squashing and Over-Smoothing: A Survey
item.description: Graph Rewiring in GNNs to Mitigate Over-Squashing and Over-Smoothing: A Survey

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Robust volatility updates for Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering
item.description: Robust volatility updates for Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physiology-Aware Masked Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Biosignal Representation Learning
item.description: Physiology-Aware Masked Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Biosignal Representation Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Continual Learning of Feedback-based Molecular Communication
item.description: Continual Learning of Feedback-based Molecular Communication

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Finite-Sample Analysis of Elimination in Active Hypothesis Testing
item.description: Finite-Sample Analysis of Elimination in Active Hypothesis Testing

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning
item.description: Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference
item.description: LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility
item.description: GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A dimensional R2 regression metric
item.description: A dimensional R2 regression metric

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression
item.description: Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Networked Information Aggregation for Binary Classification
item.description: Networked Information Aggregation for Binary Classification

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models
item.description: H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DIAGRAMS: A Review Framework for Reasoning-Level Attribution in Diagram QA
item.description: DIAGRAMS: A Review Framework for Reasoning-Level Attribution in Diagram QA

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Model Organisms Are Leaky: Perplexity Differencing Often Reveals Finetuning Objectives
item.description: Model Organisms Are Leaky: Perplexity Differencing Often Reveals Finetuning Objectives

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can AI Debias the News? LLM Interventions Improve Cross-Partisan Receptivity but LLMs Overestimate Their Own Effectiveness
item.description: Can AI Debias the News? LLM Interventions Improve Cross-Partisan Receptivity but LLMs Overestimate Their Own Effectiveness

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine
item.description: CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Psychologically Potent, Computationally Invisible: LLMs Generate Social-Comparison Triggers They Fail to Detect
item.description: Psychologically Potent, Computationally Invisible: LLMs Generate Social-Comparison Triggers They Fail to Detect

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Theoretical Game of Attacks via Compositional Skills
item.description: A Theoretical Game of Attacks via Compositional Skills

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Compared to What? Baselines and Metrics for Counterfactual Prompting
item.description: Compared to What? Baselines and Metrics for Counterfactual Prompting

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Systematic Exploration of Text Decomposition and Budget Distribution in Differentially Private Text Obfuscation
item.description: A Systematic Exploration of Text Decomposition and Budget Distribution in Differentially Private Text Obfuscation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Controlled Paraphrase Geometry in Sentence Embedding Space: Local Manifold Modeling and Latent Probing
item.description: Controlled Paraphrase Geometry in Sentence Embedding Space: Local Manifold Modeling and Latent Probing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Teaching LLMs Brazilian Healthcare: Injecting Knowledge from Official Clinical Guidelines
item.description: Teaching LLMs Brazilian Healthcare: Injecting Knowledge from Official Clinical Guidelines

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Interpretable Difficulty-Aware Knowledge Tracing in Tutor-Student Dialogues
item.description: Interpretable Difficulty-Aware Knowledge Tracing in Tutor-Student Dialogues

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Component-Aware Self-Speculative Decoding in Hybrid Language Models
item.description: Component-Aware Self-Speculative Decoding in Hybrid Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Quantifying and Predicting Disagreement in Graded Human Ratings
item.description: Quantifying and Predicting Disagreement in Graded Human Ratings

item.description: Compute Optimal Tokenization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SRA: Span Representation Alignment for Large Language Model Distillation
item.description: SRA: Span Representation Alignment for Large Language Model Distillation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Lost in the Tower of Babel: The Adverse Effects of Incidental Multilingualism in LLMs
item.description: Lost in the Tower of Babel: The Adverse Effects of Incidental Multilingualism in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GIFT: Guided Fine-Tuning and Transfer for Enhancing Instruction-Tuned Language Models
item.description: GIFT: Guided Fine-Tuning and Transfer for Enhancing Instruction-Tuned Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Addressing Data Scarcity in Bangla Fake News Detection: An LLM-Based Dataset Augmentation Approach
item.description: Addressing Data Scarcity in Bangla Fake News Detection: An LLM-Based Dataset Augmentation Approach

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Semantic Relevance: Counterfactual Risk Minimization for Robust Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Beyond Semantic Relevance: Counterfactual Risk Minimization for Robust Retrieval-Augmented Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Enhancing Game Review Sentiment Classification on Steam Platform with Attention-Based BiLSTM
item.description: Enhancing Game Review Sentiment Classification on Steam Platform with Attention-Based BiLSTM

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sentiment Analysis of Mobile Legends App Reviews Using Machine Learning and LSTM-Based Deep Learning Models
item.description: Sentiment Analysis of Mobile Legends App Reviews Using Machine Learning and LSTM-Based Deep Learning Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Benchmarking LightGBM and BiLSTM for Sentiment Analysis on Indonesian E-Commerce Reviews
item.description: Benchmarking LightGBM and BiLSTM for Sentiment Analysis on Indonesian E-Commerce Reviews

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Creating and Evaluating Figurative Language Dataset for Sindhi

item.description: OralMLLM-Bench: Evaluating Cognitive Capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models in Dental Practice
